ddls:
CREATE TABLE "racers" (
  "racer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each racer */,
  "alias" TEXT /* Racing alias of the racer */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user account associated with the racer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the racer */,
  "division" TEXT /* Racing division the racer belongs to (e.g., PRO, AMATEUR) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the racer belongs to */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the racer */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the racer joined the organization */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the racer's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the racer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("racer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_racers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_racers_division FOREIGN KEY ("division") REFERENCES racing_divisions ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track where the event took place */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., championship, exhibition) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "max_participants" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants allowed in the event */,
  "registration_fee" REAL /* Registration fee for the event */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Name of the event organizer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_track_name FOREIGN KEY ("track_name") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "racer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the racer who made the submission */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event where the submission was made */,
  "submission_time" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the submission was made */,
  "lap_count" INTEGER /* Number of laps completed in the submission */,
  "avg_lap_time" REAL /* Average lap time of the submission */,
  "best_lap_time" REAL /* Best lap time of the submission */,
  "total_lap_time" REAL /* Total lap time of the submission */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle used by the racer */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the submission */,
  "track_conditions" TEXT /* Track conditions during the submission */,
  "fuel_consumption" REAL /* Fuel consumption during the submission */,
  "tyre_type" TEXT /* Type of tyres used during the submission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_racer_id FOREIGN KEY ("racer_id") REFERENCES racers ("racer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboard_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaderboard status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the leaderboard status (e.g., SUCCESS) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboard_submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the submission being ranked */,
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the leaderboard where the submission is being ranked */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the leaderboard status */,
  "ranking_score" REAL /* Score of the submission in the leaderboard */,
  "ranking" INTEGER /* Ranking of the submission in the leaderboard */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the leaderboard entry */,
  "points_awarded" INTEGER /* Points awarded to the racer for this submission */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the submission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboard_submissions_leaderboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("leaderboard_id") REFERENCES leaderboards ("leaderboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboard_submissions_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES leaderboard_statuses ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboards" (
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaderboard */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event where the leaderboard is being used */,
  "division" TEXT /* Racing division of the leaderboard (e.g., PRO) */,
  "leaderboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the leaderboard */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event the leaderboard is for */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the leaderboard (if applicable) */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the leaderboard (if applicable) */,
  "rules" TEXT /* Rules and criteria for the leaderboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaderboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., avg_lap_time) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the performance metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "weightage" REAL /* Weightage of the metric in the overall performance score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the submission where the incident occurred */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of incident (e.g., collision, reset) */,
  "incident_time" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the incident occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the incident */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the incident */,
  "points_deducted" INTEGER /* Points deducted due to the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_incident_type FOREIGN KEY ("incident_type") REFERENCES incident_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_submission_id FOREIGN KEY ("submission_id") REFERENCES submissions ("submission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the incident type (e.g., collision, reset) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the incident type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "racing_divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each racing division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the racing division (e.g., PRO, AMATEUR) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the division */,
  "minimum_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age required for the division */,
  "maximum_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age allowed for the division */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "date_registered" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has administrative privileges */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the track */,
  "width" REAL /* Width of the track */,
  "number_of_turns" INTEGER /* Number of turns on the track */,
  "elevation_changes" TEXT /* Elevation changes on the track */,
  "surface_type" TEXT /* Type of surface of the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id")
)
